LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-24-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT HONOR HOME CARE SERVICES CALIFORNIA, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. PLAINTIFF HAS FILED A DECLARATION IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.770 THAT REQUESTS DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION. THE COURT ORDERS THE ACTION DISMISSED AND HAS EXECUTED PLAINTIFF'S FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Individual Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT HONOR HOME CARE SERVICES CALIFORNIA, INC.'s Motion To Compel Individual Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar as moot. Plaintiff has filed a declaration in compliance with CRC 3.770 that requests dismissal of this action. The court orders the action dismissed and has executed plaintiff's form of order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
